name: llm-wiki-plugin
description: A compounding, file-based knowledge wiki for AI agents: markdown + YAML frontmatter, deterministic lint, agentic search, and ingest/query/reflect skills. Follows Karpathy's LLM-Wiki pattern and Google's Open Knowledge Format.

WIKI_ROOT.title: Wiki root
WIKI_ROOT.description: Directory where your knowledge wiki lives. Defaults to ~/wiki. Use ~/.claude only if you deliberately want the wiki to share your Claude Code config dir (power-user layout).
